pain_point: Mainstream coffee feels too weak or bland
desired_outcome: Wants stronger caffeine and bolder taste

audience_name: Vietnamese diaspora missing home coffee taste
pain_point: Cannot easily find authentic Vietnamese coffee in the US
desired_outcome: Wants familiar robusta taste and cultural authenticity at home

pain_point: No time or equipment for cafe-style coffee routines
desired_outcome: Wants strong coffee fast with no machine needed

pain_point: Standard coffee feels repetitive and less exciting
desired_outcome: Wants novelty flavors with easy preparation

pain_point: Needs quick drinks that feel fun and shareable
desired_outcome: Wants easy prep plus taste variety
